rationale.R1.5: The output restructures the section into a logical flow (related work -> model -> method -> results), improving readability and comprehension.
rationale.RX.1: The agent does not explicitly state uncertainty for any claims. All statements are presented as factual.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the requested active set of dimensions.
rationale.RX.4: The output does not introduce new errors or harmful content. It preserves the original information accurately.
rationale.RX.5: The agent does not provide provenance or traceability for the changes made to the text.
